reviews.comment:
Atiende muy mal! Lerdos, no dan pelota, no te atienden, cero cero atención al cliente. Compramos unos sanguich y estaban horribles. La verdad que lamentablemente porque están en un punto estratégico en medio de la nada, podrían brindar un muy buen servicio!

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible! They're slow, they ignore you, they don't help you at all, zero customer service. We bought some sandwiches and they were awful. It's a real shame that, because they're in such a strategic location in the middle of nowhere, they could provide much better service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMVBEQUt3EAE
